texto: Companies don't exist, and at the end of the day it is people make every decision in buisnesses. Human beings, not some feastious machine programmed solely for the improvement of efficiency and revenue generation. Companies are not machines. They are not dogs, as IGN bizarrely put it. They aren't even an entity. They are merely a banner to represent the activities of humans.
explicacao: Citação de Samyoul Online sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Companies don't exist, and at the end of the day it is people make every decision in buisnesses. …” articula reflexao, controversy, ea em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e ea.
